kept.text:
GOOD NEWS 🚨 Tesla raked in $573M from SpaceX and xAI last year 🔥

Tesla’s updated annual filing reveals the automaker brought in over half a billion dollars last year through deals with two of Elon Musk’s other ventures.

In January, Tesla initially reported that the lion's share of this—roughly $430.1 million—stemmed from business with xAI. However, an amended filing submitted Thursday shows an additional $143.3 million in revenue from SpaceX.

This secondary figure was missing from the original report. The disclosure follows recent media reports that SpaceX purchased over $100 million worth of Cybertrucks in Q4 last year, providing a significant boost for the electric pickup despite its otherwise sluggish sales.

kept.text:
🚨 NEWS: S&P Dow Jones proposes major rule changes for "MegaCap" companies

• IPO seasoning cut to 6 months (from 12)
• No minimum float requirement
• No profitability requirement

This could fast-track companies like SpaceX into the S&P 500, potentially triggering hundreds of billions in passive inflows after IPO.

profile_bio.description: Follow me for daily interviews of Tesla experts, $TSLA Milestones and Humanoid Bots

quoted_tweet.text:
Huge news. The S&P Dow Jones Indices has officially proposed big rule changes for “MegaCap” companies that could fast-track companies like @SpaceX into the S&P 500.

Proposed changes:
• Faster entry. Company would now only need to be public for 6 months (instead of 12 months) before being added to indexes
• Waive the minimum public float requirement (previously it was 10% float requirement)
• Waive the profitability requirement (no need for positive net income)

This means when/if SpaceX IPOs, the company could be added to the S&P 500 as soon as 6 months after it IPOs, potentially triggering hundreds of dollars billions of dollars of forced buying upon index inclusion.

If these proposed changes are approved, they would be effective before market open on Monday, June 8, 2026 (unless otherwise announced).

kept.text:
테슬라 SEC 공시자료에서 밝혀진 스페이스X(xAI 포함)-테슬라 간거래관계 정리

1. 지분 투자 및 주식 취득 거래

- 초기 계약 체결 (26년 1월): 테슬라가 xAI Holdings의 Series E 우선주를 약 $2B에 취득하기 위한 계약을 체결함.

- 취득 권리 전환 (26년 2월): xAI Holdings가 SpaceX와 합병되어 완전 자회사로 편입됨. 이에 따라 합병 계약 조건에 의거하여 테슬라의 우선주 취득 권리가 SpaceX의 Class A 보통주 취득 권리로 전환됨.

- 주식 취득 완료 (26년 3월): 테슬라가 약 $ 2B 규모의 SpaceX Class A 보통주 취득을 최종 완료함.

2. 테슬라와 SpaceX 간 상업, 라이선스 및 지원 계약 (테슬라 비용 인식) : 2026년 2월까지 약 $12.9M의 비용 인식
(스페이스X의 기술, 장비 등 지원인듯)

3. 테슬라가 스페이스X에 차량 판매 거래 (테슬라 매출 인식) : 약 $143.4M의 매출 인식

4. 항공기 사용 비용 (테슬라의 비용 인식)
테슬라가 SpaceX 소유 및 운영 항공기를 사용함에 따라 양사 합의 요율 및 연방항공청 규정에 기반해 $420K의 비용을 인식함

5. 합병 자회사 xAI(현 스페이스X) 관련 거래 내역
- 상업, 컨설팅 및 지원 계약 지출: 테슬라가 약 $4.2M 의 비용 인식함.
- 메가팩 제품 판매 수익: 테슬라가 약 $508.2M
- 컨설팅/지원 서비스 제공 수익: 테슬라가 약 $ 330K 기타수익으로 인식함.

quoted_tweet.text:
xAI has launched Grok 4.3, achieving 53 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index with improved agentic performance, ~40% lower input price, and ~60% lower output price than Grok 4.20

The release of Grok 4.3 places @xAI just above Muse Spark and Claude Sonnet 4.6 on the Intelligence Index, and a 4 points ahead of the latest version of Grok 4.20. Grok 4.3 improves its Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index score while reducing cost to run the benchmark suite.

Key Takeaways:

➤ Grok 4.3 improves on cost-per-intelligence relative to Grok 4.20 0309 v2: it scores higher on the Intelligence Index while costing less to run the full benchmark suite. Grok 4.3 costs $395 to run the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index, around 20% lower than Grok 4.20 0309 v2, despite using more output tokens. This makes it one of the lower-cost models at its intelligence level

➤ Large increase in real world agentic task performance: The largest single benchmark improvement is on GDPval-AA, where Grok 4.3 scores an ELO of 1500, up 321 points from Grok 4.20 0309 v2’s score of 1179 Grok 4.3, surpassing Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, Muse Spark, Gpt-5.4 mini (xhigh), and Kimi K2.5. Grok 4.3 narrows the gap to the leading model on GDPval-AA, but still trails GPT-5.5 (xhigh) by 276 Elo points, with an expected win rate of ~17% against GPT-5.5 (xhigh) under the standard Elo formula

➤ Grok 4.3’s performs strongly on instruction following and agentic customer support tasks. It gains 5 points on 𝜏²-Bench Telecom to reach 98%, in line with GLM-5.1. Grok 4.3 maintains an 81% IFBench score from Grok 4.20 0309 v2

➤ Gains 8 points on AA-Omniscience Accuracy, but at the cost of lower AA-Omniscience Non-Hallucination Rate of 8 points, so Grok 4.20 0309 v2 still leads AA-Omniscience Non-Hallucination Rate, followed by MiMo-V2.5-Pro, in line with Grok 4.3

Congratulations to @xAI and @elonmusk on the impressive release!

kept.text: Falcon Heavy Side Boosters: Perfectly Synced Separation Watch this breathtaking moment as Falcon Heavy’s twin side boosters peel away in flawless synchronization during the April 29, 2026 launch of ViaSat-3 F3 from Launch Complex 39A at Kennedy Space Center.After delivering their powerful heavy-lift burn, the side cores cleanly separated, allowing the center core to continue propelling the massive ~6-ton satellite toward geosynchronous transfer orbit (GTO). This marked the 12th successful Falcon Heavy mission — the first in 18 months — and delivered yet another flawless performance. Moments later, the twin boosters executed a dramatic flip, fired their boostback burns, and nailed near-simultaneous landings at LZ-2 and LZ-40. Precision engineering at its absolute finest.The successful deployment of ViaSat-3 F3 completes the ViaSat-3 global constellation, bringing high-capacity, high-speed broadband to millions across the Asia-Pacific region.Another spectacular chapter in SpaceX’s reusable rocket story — proving once again why Falcon Heavy remains one of the most powerful and reliable heavy-lift vehicles flying today.Pure rocket porn.

NEWS UPDATE: The S&P 500 just announced new proposed rule changes that would make it easier for SpaceX, OpenAI, and other new IPOs

- The changes would lower the time a company must be public before being added down to 6 months from 12 months

- Mega-cap companies would not be subject to the S&P 500's profitability and ownership rules

🌱🇺🇸

profile_bio.description: Chief Analyst demystifying finance and economics #Politics $Gold & Digital Assets. sound money advocate.

quoted_tweet.text:
JUST IN: S&P DOW JONES INDICES IS PROPOSING METHODOLOGY CHANGES THAT WOULD MAKE IT EASIER FOR "MEGACAP" IPOS TO JOIN THE S&P 500

The proposed rule changes:
- Cut the IPO seasoning period from 12 months to 6 months
- Waive the minimum 0.10 Investable Weight Factor (IWF) requirement for MegaCap companies
- Waive the financial viability (positive net income) requirement for MegaCap companies

A "MegaCap" is defined as any company in the top 100 of the S&P Total Market Index (currently a $112 billion threshold).

Why it matters for SpaceX:
- SpaceX is reportedly targeting a $1.75 trillion IPO valuation in late June
- The IPO filing showed Musk can only be removed from the board by a vote of the share class he controls, a structure that would ordinarily fail the 0.10 IWF rule
- The waiver of the financial viability requirement removes another potential roadblock

The proposed implementation date is June 8, 2026, almost exactly when SpaceX is reportedly targeting its IPO.

S&P DJI is collecting market feedback through May 28, 2026.

kept.text:
💥🌖 Des informations complémentaires sur le débris de fusée Falcon 9 qui percutera la Lune.

Le 5 août 2026, le deuxième étage d’un lanceur Falcon 9 (numéro de série 2025-010D) s’écrasera sur la Lune. Cet objet provient du lancement du 15 janvier 2025 depuis le Kennedy Space Center, qui a emporté les atterrisseurs lunaires Blue Ghost (Firefly Aerospace, mission réussie) et Hakuto-R M2 (ispace, contact perdu avant l’atterrissage). 

🔹 Heure de l’impact : le 5 août 2026 vers 06h44 UTC, soit 08h44 CEST (heure de Paris). Cette estimation pourrait légèrement évoluer sous l’effet de forces comme la pression de radiation solaire.

🔹 Lieu de l’impact : sur le bord du cratère Einstein, sur la face visible de la Lune, à proximité du limbe ouest. Coordonnées approximatives : latitude 15° N, longitude 272° E, dans une région fortement cratérisée.

🔹 Dimensions : ce deuxième étage de Falcon 9 (version Full Thrust / Block 5) mesure 13,8 mètres de hauteur, 3,7 mètres de diamètre, pour une masse d’environ 4 000 kg (à vide)… soit l’équivalent d’un immeuble de 4 à 5 étages !

🔹 Caractéristiques de l’impact : l’étage est en rotation, comme l’indiquent les variations de brillance observées. La vitesse à l’impact est estimée à 2,43 km/s (soit environ 8 700 km/h). Sans atmosphère lunaire, il frappera la surface intact et créera un petit cratère.

🔹 Un événement rare : il s’agit seulement du deuxième impact involontaire connu d’un débris artificiel sur la Lune, après celui d’un étage chinois en 2022.

📷 : Un étage de Falcon 9 similaire à celui qui s’écrasera sur la Lune (SpaceX).
📄 : Upper stage impacting the moon on 2026 August 5 – Bill Gray, mise à jour du 25 avril 2026. Merci à Bill Gray pour son travail rigoureux sur les débris spatiaux.

profile_bio.description: Xplora - le média qui Xplore l’Espace ! 🌍🚀✨ | Votre source d’informations spatiales 🇫🇷 | Actualités, astronomie… 🪐🛰️🔭 | Aurores, activité du Soleil ☀️

quoted_tweet.text:
🚀🌖 Le second étage d’une fusée Falcon 9 de SpaceX pourrait s’écraser sur la Lune le 5 août 2026.

🔹 L’astronome Bill Gray a repéré et calculé la trajectoire de cet étage de fusée SpaceX, catalogué sous la désignation 2025-010D. Il prévoit un impact près du limbe lunaire, sur la partie éclairée de la Lune.

🔹 Ce débris provient du lancement du 15 janvier 2025 qui emportait l’atterrisseur lunaire Blue Ghost de Firefly. L’étage supérieur est resté en orbite haute avant de prendre la direction de la Lune.

🔹 L’étage de fusée percutera la Lune à 2,43km/s. L’impact devrait créer un cratère mais il est peu probable que l’événement soit visible depuis la Terre en raison de sa position, proche du limbe.

👉 L’impact devrait n’entraîner aucun danger pour les activités lunaires actuelles. Il souligne néanmoins le besoin de surveillance des débris spatiaux en orbite, y compris dans le voisinage de la Lune.

📄 : Bill Gray, Upper stage impacting the moon on 2026 August 5, via Project Pluto.
